Professor Botter is an exceptional professor. He actively seeks feedback about his teaching and class structure and impressively improves upon it weekly. My team and I were able to discuss our research and strategy frameworks during interviews for quant roles in the bank and Hedge Funds. Professor Botter's class is widely regarded as one of the popular and most impactful courses at Columbia University, within the Mathematical Finance program.
